'''G'hol''' was the fourth planet orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[C'rel]] in the [[N'zoth system/Legends|N'zoth system]]. Located in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], it was a terrestrial planet.<ref name="TEA" />

*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
